name: MISRA C++: No Mandatory Violation
description: Mandatory guidelines are never violated — no deviation is permitted against a Mandatory guideline.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: all Mandatory guidelines must be followed to achieve compliance; deviations are not allowed.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C++:2023. https://misra.org.uk/
